name: glm-plugin-cc
description: Claude Code plugin: GLM reviewer via z.ai (OpenAI-compatible HTTP).

scripts.check: node --check scripts/glm-companion.mjs && node --check scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs && node --check scripts/check-imports.mjs && for f in scripts/lib/*.mjs; do node --check $f || exit 1; done && node scripts/check-imports.mjs
scripts.ci:local:fast: npm run check && npm test && bash scripts/ci/check-ai-quality-gate.sh
